## 🔴 ERRORS (must resolve before import)

| Row | Anomaly Type | Description | Proposed Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| 16 | `NEGATIVE_AMOUNT` | Amount is negative or zero (`-1500`). | Convert amount to positive value (`1500`) |
| 121 | `INVALID_DATE` | Date field is missing/blank. | Set date to today's date (2025-06-14) |
| 122 | `INACTIVE_MEMBER_INVOLVED` | Payer "Meera" was inactive on 2025-04-10 (left 2025-03-31). | Skip importing this row |
| 123 | `INACTIVE_MEMBER_INVOLVED` | Payer "Sam" was inactive on 2025-04-10 (joined 2025-04-15). | Skip importing this row |
| 124 | `MISSING_AMOUNT` | Amount field contains non-numeric value (`"abc"`). | Set default amount to 0 |
| 125 | `MISSING_PAYER` | PaidBy field is blank. | Assign current user as payer |
| 126 | `UNKNOWN_USER` | Payer `stranger@example.com` not found in group members. | Assign current user as payer |
| 128 | `UNSUPPORTED_SPLIT_TYPE` | Split type `"RANDOM"` is not supported. | Default split type to EQUAL |
| 129 | `SPLIT_MISMATCH` | EXACT split shares sum to `600` but amount is `1200`. | Adjust last share to balance (add `600` to last participant) |
| 130 | `SPLIT_MISMATCH` | PERCENTAGE split sums to `90%`, not `100%`. | Adjust last percentage to `40%` (from `30%`) to reach 100% |
| 133 | `NEGATIVE_AMOUNT` | Amount is zero (`0`). | Convert to positive or skip row |
| 134 | `INACTIVE_MEMBER_INVOLVED` | Split participant "Meera" was inactive on 2025-05-01 (left 2025-03-31). | Exclude Meera from this split |
